title: serratula glandulifera
intro: Serratula glandulifera, also known as the glandular knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Serratula glandulifera are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
